page.title: Download the Kıta Plastik catalog
page.description: Enter your email address and we'll send the catalog in your preferred language within seconds.

form.localeHint: The catalog PDF will be sent in the language you choose.
form.successBody: Check your inbox in a few minutes. If you don't see it, please check your spam folder.
form.errorRateLimit: Too many requests. Please try again in {minutes} minutes.
form.errorTurnstile: Security check failed. Please refresh the page and try again.
form.errorGeneric: Could not send the catalog. Please try again.
